name: GE Vernova Inc.
summary: GE Vernova Inc. is a global leader in the electric power industry, designing, manufacturing, delivering, and servicing technologies that generate, transfer, orchestrate, convert, and store electricity. Its installed base generates approximately 25% of the world's electricity. The company serves utilities, developers, governments, and electricity users, offering products and services enabling electrification and decarbonization across gas, wind, grid, and other power technologies.

products.name: Power Generation Equipment
products.description: Equipment and services for generating electricity, including gas and other power technologies.

products.name: Grid Solutions
products.description: Technologies for transferring, orchestrating, converting, and storing electricity across power grids.

products.name: Wind Energy Products
products.description: Wind power generation equipment and associated services for onshore and offshore applications.

products.name: Long-Term Service Agreements
products.description: Service and maintenance contracts supporting GE Vernova's global installed base of power equipment.

partnerships.description: GE completed spin-off of GE Vernova on April 2, 2024, distributing all shares to GE stockholders.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
